prs.title: SM-503: Ace Validation Engine
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Introduces a complete ACE validation engine from scratch including type definitions, field definitions, mapper, validator logic, schema migrations, server actions, and a full sandbox UI — a substantial new subsystem across 12 files.

prs.title: Ch/sm 400
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Same file set and line count as PR #359 — this is a merge/integration PR that consolidates the ACE validation work; Chris authored the core feature and Jason performed the merge, with Chris carrying nearly all the effort.

prs.title: Ch/sm 400: Prospect Enrichment Agent
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Builds a full Prospect Enrichment Agent with LangGraph state machine, prompts, entrypoint, multiple schema migrations, BullMQ enqueueing, seed updates, and sandbox UI across 25 files — a major new AI agent feature.

prs.title: Field displayName, catalog helpers, CSV/portfolio/agents alignment
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds displayName to field definitions and ripples alignment fixes across catalog helpers, CSV export, portfolio, and multiple agents/tools across 35 files, but the per-file changes are modest given only 362 custom lines.

prs.title: fix(worker): CJS bundle defines import.meta.url for createRequire
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-file, 10-line build config fix to define import.meta.url for CJS bundling — a trivial infrastructure tweak.

prs.title: Rival admin polish, ISVA Partner Finder status, readiness smoke path
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Wide-ranging PR touching rival admin polish, ISVA Partner Finder status field, readiness smoke path, admin UI components, orchestrator updates, and model/tool utilities across 48 files and 4456 lines — a large multi-domain effort.

prs.title: Block portfolio access while impersonating a company
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds portfolio access blocking during company impersonation with guard logic in a handful of files plus an e2e test — a focused, modest security/UX feature.

prs.title: Fleet-wide collector + cleanup admin tools
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Introduces fleet-wide bulk collector dispatch, new BullMQ job types, worker handler, bulk UI dialogs for companies and rivals, and orchestrator updates across 13 files — a significant admin/infrastructure feature.

prs.title: Maturity stage derivation, ISVA display, admin export polish
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Delivers maturity stage derivation logic, ISVA display integration, admin export polish, new schema fields, backfill scripts, and assessment UI node updates across 39 files — a large cross-cutting feature touching AI, UI, and data layers.

prs.title: SM-495: refactors badge collector
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Refactors the badge collector and updates the agent integration across 2 files with 279 lines — a focused, self-contained AI collector improvement.

prs.title: Ch/sm 432: Maturity Stage Calculator
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Small set of targeted UI tweaks across assessment node components and types with only 53 lines — a minor feature/display update for the maturity stage calculator.

prs.title: Portfolio companies: PFV/backing-table rollups, competitive cards, CSV export
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Builds out portfolio company rollups (PFV/backing-table), competitive landscape and threat cards, CSV export, and a refresh button across 9 files with ~1953 lines — a meaningful new analytics/UI feature set.

prs.title: Portfolio dashboard, rival→company promotion UI, and shared user-type module
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Introduces the portfolio dashboard, rival-to-company promotion UI, shared user-type module, knowledge base wiring, and broad admin table/action updates across 39 files with 3772 lines — a major multi-domain feature.

prs.title: Rival graph, product-scoped KB, bulk uploads, and lifecycle-flag cleanup
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Transformative PR spanning rival graph, product-scoped knowledge base, bulk uploads, competitive analysis agent, Pinecone vector store, BrightData collectors, lifecycle cleanup, and extensive schema/UI changes across 110 files with 8554 lines — clearly weeks of architectural work.

stories.name: ACE Validation & Prospect Enrichment Intelligence
stories.rationale: Delivered the ACE Validation Engine alongside a Prospect Enrichment Agent to automate and validate business readiness assessments end-to-end.

stories.name: SM-400 Core Platform Foundation
stories.rationale: Implemented core platform changes tied to the SM-400 initiative to support downstream features and integrations.

stories.name: Rival & Competitive Intelligence Graph
stories.rationale: Built a rival knowledge graph with product-scoped knowledge bases, bulk upload support, and a refactored badge collector to power competitive intelligence workflows.

stories.name: Portfolio Dashboard & Company Promotion
stories.rationale: Launched the portfolio dashboard with rival-to-company promotion UI and blocked portfolio access during impersonation to protect data integrity.

stories.name: Maturity Stage Scoring & ISVA Readiness Display
stories.rationale: Introduced maturity stage derivation logic, a user-facing Maturity Stage Calculator, and polished ISVA display and admin export capabilities.

stories.name: Portfolio Analytics, Rollups & CSV Export
stories.rationale: Added PFV and backing-table rollups, competitive cards, and CSV export to give portfolio managers richer company-level analytics.

stories.name: Admin Tooling: Fleet Collector, Partner Finder & Readiness Smoke Path
stories.rationale: Delivered fleet-wide data collection and cleanup tools alongside admin polish for the ISVA Partner Finder status and readiness smoke path to streamline operations.

stories.name: Data Schema Alignment: Display Names, Catalog & CSV
stories.rationale: Standardized field display names and catalog helpers to ensure consistent data representation across CSV exports, portfolios, and agents.

stories.name: Worker Bundle Compatibility Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed a CJS bundle issue with import.meta.url to restore worker compatibility in the build pipeline.
